zh.Sandford, Devonshire, England: 英國英格蘭戴文桑德福德
zh.Blackborough, Devon, England: 英國英格蘭戴文布拉可波洛
zh.Sandford, Peverell, Devon, England: 英國英格蘭戴文桑德福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Cobham於1262年出生在英國戴文布拉可波洛時，他的父親John de Cobham33歲，母親Joan Septvans21歲。他和Amicia Bolhay至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1335年12月27日在英國英格蘭戴文布拉可波洛享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Cobham于1262年出生在英国戴文布拉可波洛时，他的父亲John de Cobham33岁，母亲Joan Septvans21岁。他和Amicia Bolhay至少有1个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1335年12月27日在英国英格兰戴文布拉可波洛享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cobham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of at least three places in southern England called Cobham, in Kent, Surrey, and Sussex.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When John Cobham was born in 1262, in Blackborough, Devon, England, his father, John de Cobham, was 33 and his mother, Joan Septvans, was 21. He had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with Amicia Bolhay. He died on 27 December 1335, in Blackborough, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Cobham est né en 1262, à Blackborough, Devon, Angleterre, son père, John de Cobham, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Joan Septvans, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles avec Amicia Bolhay. Il est décédé le 27 décembre 1335, à Blackborough, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Cobham 1262 in Blackborough, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Cobham 33 und seine Mutter Joan Septvans 21. Er hatte mit Amicia Bolhay mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 27. Dezember 1335 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Blackborough, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Cobham è nato il nel 1262 nel Blackborough, Devon, England, il suo padre, John de Cobham, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Joan Septvans, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie con Amicia Bolhay. Morì il 27 dicembre 1335, nel Blackborough, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Cobhamが1262年にイギリスデボンブラクボロウで生まれた時，父John de Cobhamは33歳，母Joan Septvansは21歳であった。彼はAmicia Bolhayとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1335年12月27日にイギリスイギリスデボンブラクボロウで73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Cobham(이)가 1262년 영국 데폰 블랙버루그h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Cobham(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Septvans(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Amicia Bolhay(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1335년 12월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 블랙버루그h에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Cobham nasceu em 1262, em Blackborough, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Cobham, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Joan Septvans, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas com Amicia Bolhay. Ele faleceu em 27 de dezembro de 1335, em Blackborough, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Cobham родился в 1262 г. в местности блэккбороую, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Cobham было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Septvans, 21. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери от Amicia Bolhay. Он умер 27 декабря 1335 г. в местности блэккбороую, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Cobham nació en 1262, en Blackborough, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Cobham, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Joan Septvans, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas con Amicia Bolhay. Murió el 27 de diciembre de 1335, en Blackborough, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 73 años.
